title: Group By
description: Calculate statistics for specific categories by grouping rows with identical column values.
problemStatement:
Categorical breakdown! From the `products` table, select the `category` and the `COUNT(*)` of products in that category.

**Requirement:** Use a `GROUP BY` clause on the category column.
hints: When using aggregate functions alongside normal columns, you MUST group by those columns.
expectedOutput: List of categories and their respective counts
solutionCode: SELECT category, COUNT(*) FROM products GROUP BY category;
